brand.name: Houston's First Baptist Church
brand.mission: The Great Commission; making disciples of all nations (Matthew 28:19-20)

traits.name: Generous
traits.tagline: We have so much to be grateful for.

traits.name: Vibrant
traits.coreMessage: Lively, joy-filled community of spiritual growth
traits.tagline: Life is full, and so are our hearts.

traits.name: Relational
traits.coreMessage: Close connections; everyone known and valued

traits.name: Attentive
traits.coreMessage: Present every day, not just Sundays

rules: Never apply brand colors to the logo; the logo is black or white only.
Core colors dominate; accent colors highlight only.
Web pages on the HoustonsFirstV1 theme must use theme classes (text-{color}, bg-{color}, btn-{color}), never hard-coded hex.

seasonal.note: REVIEW: an earlier guideline listed apricot as the winter accent and kelly for spring/fall; Communications to confirm the canonical mapping.

primary.role: Body copy when legibility needs a boost

condensed.role: Large amounts of copy in small spaces

elements.logomark: Cross centered in three concentric circles; represents vision (Relevant, Biblical, Community) and strategy (Gather, Grow, Give)
elements.logotype: HOUSTON'S FIRST BAPTIST CHURCH in all caps

lockups.name: Logomark only
lockups.use: App icons, merchandise, when brand is established on the piece; on print, the full church name must appear somewhere

colorVariations: White on dark or photo backgrounds (add dark overlay if needed)
neverDo: Place color logo on busy/dark photo background
Add extra elements around or on the logo
logo.clearspace: x = half the height/width of the logomark

voice.summary: Write the way a warm, confident, real person talks; not like a press release or a sermon outline.
do: Use we and you; relational and direct
Lead with the human tension before the church answer
Be honest about struggle; the brand is Genuine
dont: Say Sunday School; say Life Bible Study instead

rules: Abbreviate months except June and July
Always include day of week for single dates
Don't repeat a/p within a same-meridiem range (9–11a)

dashes.hyphen: compound words, campus names like Faith Center–Spring Branch

ministryNames: Life Bible Study / Life Bible Studies / LBS (after first reference, sparingly)
First Friends Preschool Ministry / First Friends
First Kids Children's Ministry / First Kids
The HUB Student Ministry / The HUB
Thru the Roof Special Needs Ministry / Thru the Roof
Single Parent Family Ministry / SPF Ministry
Legacy 68:5 Adoption, Foster & Orphan Care Ministry / Legacy 68:5

checklist: Logo: correct lockup, black or white only, clearspace respected, not modified
Colors: core dominate, accent sparing, no unapproved colors
Typography: Gibson + Tisa Pro or approved alternates, correct hierarchy
Voice: warm, relational, genuine; not preachy or insider-only
Copy: correct church, campus, and ministry name spelling
Audience: external disconnected families OR internal members, not both at once
Brand trait: at least one of the five traits reflected
